collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, Or.
description:
Story of illicit love involving a woman named Hind and her husband, a man named Bishr and an old woman. Cf. H. T. Norris, "The Sad Fate of Bishr and Hind and the Diffusion of an Ancient Arabian Love Story," New Arabian Studies 3 (1996), 79–111. Joins: Ezra Chwat and Alan Elbaum.

Cf. T-S AS 177.67 (PGPID 37026).
tags: spell, lovesickness, popular literature, to edit, magic
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
